title: Maple Flavored MC
description: A Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric Modpack! Aims to be Vanilla++.
body:
A VERY self-indulgent modpack I made for myself and my friends to use, but that I put a lot of thought and care into- so I’ll share it with the world. This pack is a humble attempt to create my personal “perfect” version of minecraft, which I can only really describe as vanilla++ with a hint of kitchen sink.

Will you vibe with this? Hard to say for sure. I think you’ll enjoy what this pack has to offer if you like to define your own fun and embrace variety. There are no advancements or quests to complete (though I have included a guidebook to point you towards a few interesting things).

If you decide to try it out, I hope above all else that you enjoy your time <3

**Known Bugs:**

-The game crashes without sufficient memory allocation. I recommend around 4000MB or more, 6000 at least for a world host.

-Don't update the Musket Mod! The latest version crashes during world generation.
